nameMeanings.name: Lucia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of the old Roman given name Lucius, which is probably a derivative of Latin lux ‘light’. The girl's name is common in Italy and elsewhere, and is found as a learned, Latinate doublet of Lucy in England. St Lucia of Syracuse, who was martyred in 304 , was a very popular saint in the Middle Ages; she is often represented in medieval art as blinded and with her eyes on a platter, but the tradition that she had her eyes put out is probably based on nothing more than the association between light and eyes.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Lucia was born in 1273, in Charminster, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. She married Terricus Harang Herring in 1290, in Chaldon Herring, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in Langton Herring, Dorset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Luciaは1273年にイギリスイギリスドールセトチャーミンスターで生まれた。1290年にイギリスイギリスドールセトチャルドン ハーリングでTerricus Harang Herringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女はイギリスドールセトラントン ハーリングで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucia(은)는 1273년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 처민스터에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1290년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 차던 허링에서 Terricus Harang Herring(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 도르세트 랭턴 허링에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Lucia родилась в 1273 г. в местности чарминстир, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Terricus Harang Herring в 1290 г. в местности халдон хирринг, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в местности лангтон хирринг, дорсет, Англия.
